title: Exemptions of the existing models of buses with seating capacity 13 or more passengers excluding driver from the purview of sub-rule (1) of rule 125C, CMVR.
description: Exemptions of the existing models of buses with seating capacity 13 or more passengers excluding driver from the purview of sub-rule (1) of rule 125C, CMVR.

[No. RT-11028/02/2013-MVL] ABHAY DAMLE, Jt.
